The '''Tertiary Kadok system''',<ref name="air" /> also known as the '''Guiteica system''',<ref name="The Essential Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in the [[Kadok Regions/Legends|Kadok Regions]] of [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It contained the planet [[Guiteica/Legends|Guiteica]] and orbited one star, [[Kadok III]].<ref name="air" />
